Greeting: Hello, you've reached Ben's Electric Solutions. How can I help you today?
Transfer: If you need to speak with someone, I can transfer you to Ben. Please hold for just a moment.
Fallback: I didn't quite understand that. Can you please repeat or rephrase your question?

ServiceCall.Intro: We do have a service call fee of $115, which covers the initial call out to the job site.
ServiceCall.HourlyRate: Our hourly rate is $98 per hour for residential jobs, billed in half-hour increments.

AfterHours.Message: We're not available to take your call right now. We'll get back to you the next business day. If you're calling from G&M Pressure Washing, please let us know and we'll do our best to assist you.
